name: NecroWorld
short_description: NecroWorld is a RPG that takes place in the NecroCatic Games world with many unique characters, enemies, upgrades and collectibles!
detailed_description:
This game features various enemies and characters from other NecroCatic Games' releases such as "The Tower of Wowers", "CarsFuckingDragons" and "Grand Strokers" in a brand spankin' new adventure!

It has some throw back maps and is a stand alone game set in the NecroCatic World. We hope you enjoy!!

The game features :

•Two dozen different characters to recruit and find!! You may recognize some of them!

•Tons of enemies and bosses to fight hand-drawn by Cesare from Italy!

•A digital metric poop ton of armor and weapons to collect!

•Traditional turn-based combat with new and clearly superior Retro Sideview Combat!

•Open World Exploration with many maps!

•Another Dragon Strip Club!! You read that right!

•Day/night cycle with the hour, day, week, month and even year!

•In-game weather system.

•Chase events...

And more...
